faq-booking-1.question: How do I book a room on BKS Stay?
faq-booking-1.answer: Visit the BKS Stay homepage, select your destination, stay dates, and number of guests to search for available rooms. After choosing a room and completing representative contact details, pay the deposit or room fee online via dynamic VietQR through the SePay gateway. Within 5–15 seconds of successful automatic reconciliation, the system sends a confirmation email with your Stay Voucher and Stay Portal login credentials.

faq-booking-2.question: Can I book a room for someone else?
faq-booking-2.answer: Yes. When filling in booking details, enter the exact full name, phone number, and email of the guest representative in the contact section. All confirmation messages, Stay Voucher, and Stay Portal login details will be sent to that email for check-in.

faq-booking-3.question: How do I view my booking history?
faq-booking-3.answer: Sign in to the BKS Stay Portal at http://localhost:5173/bks-stay/login using your Booking Code (e.g. BKS-92830-XYZ) and registered email. After signing in, select "Booking history" from the left menu to view your orders (Upcoming, Completed, Cancelled) and tap a room card for details.

faq-cancel-1.question: What is BKS Stay's cancellation policy?
faq-cancel-1.answer: Clear cancellation rules apply based on stay length and booking time: 1) Short stays (under 30 nights): free cancellation 7+ days before check-in (100% deposit refund); 50% fee from 2 to under 7 days; 100% penalty (no refund) if cancelled within 48 hours. 2) Long stays (30+ nights): free cancellation 30+ days before check-in (100% deposit refund); 50% fee from 7 to under 30 days; 100% penalty if cancelled within 7 days. 3) Last-minute bookings (< 24h before check-in): no refund for non-refundable rates; up to 50% deposit refund for refundable rates if cancelled at least 4 hours before check-in.

faq-cancel-2.question: How long does a refund take after cancellation?
faq-cancel-2.answer: For valid cancellation requests confirmed by the system, refunds are transferred directly to your bank account within 3–5 business days through BKS Stay reconciliation. For payments made directly to hosts outside the system, refund timing and method are agreed between both parties.

faq-payment-1.question: What payment and deposit methods does BKS Stay support?
faq-payment-1.answer: We support online payment via dynamic VietQR (SePay gateway) for fast automatic matching (5–15 seconds), or direct bank transfer to the host (upload transaction receipt to the system). Dynamic deposit policy: no deposit required on weekdays/low season (hold until 14:00/18:00 same day); 50–100% deposit required on weekends (Fri & Sat), holidays, or peak season; 100% deposit/payment required for last-minute bookings within 24h of check-in. For long-term rentals, escrow deposit is required online or in person before signing the stay contract.

faq-payment-2.question: Can I pay at check-in?
faq-payment-2.answer: Yes, depending on dynamic deposit policy: on weekdays or low season you may pay 100% on arrival. For weekends, holidays, peak season, or last-minute bookings (within 24h of check-in), you must pay 50–100% deposit online to confirm the reservation.

faq-account-1.question: How do I get my room door code?
faq-account-1.answer: The smart lock code appears automatically under "Room access" on the booking detail page in BKS Stay Portal after successful online check-in or at standard check-in time (from 14:00 on arrival day).

faq-account-2.question: Is my personal information secure?
faq-account-2.answer: Yes. BKS Stay strictly protects guest personal data. Information is transmitted and stored securely with SSL encryption and used only for booking confirmation, electronic rental contracts, and temporary residence registration as required by law.

faq-service-1.question: Can I change the Wi-Fi password?
faq-service-1.answer: Wi-Fi passwords at properties are fixed for stable, secure connectivity. Scan the QR code in the room or view network name and password under "In-room guide" (Stay Guide) on the Stay Portal dashboard after check-in.

faq-service-2.question: Where is the building parking?
faq-service-2.answer: Most apartments and buildings in BKS Stay have on-site motorbike and car parking. Open "Directions & Parking" on your booking detail page in Stay Portal for entry maps and parking rules, or contact the host/front desk for assistance.
